extension.summary: Stream Live Indian Channels & VOD Content From JioTV on Kodi
extension.description: Enjoy Live TV experience and Video on Demand content in Kodi.
extension.news:
v1.2.0 - Added: Global Network Hotspot Fix (Bypasses Android IPv6 broken routes via advancedsettings for seamless hotspot streaming) - Fixed: VOD Catchup and Live TV intermittent freezing and connectivity errors - Improved: Persistent non-blocking background connections (TLS pooling) for dramatically faster start times and fluid Kodi UI - Fixed: EPG metadata and updated source to a more stable structure - Fix: Included missing UI string translations, PVR integration updates, and devtools.
v1.1.5 - Added: Favourite management features (Backup, Restore, Share, Restore-Shared) - Fixed: EPG data source (Updated to daily maintained source and enabled manual override in settings) - Improved: Backup path for account settings to persist even upon addon removal and reinstallation
v1.1.4 - Channel Fixes & Core Stability
v1.1.3 - Added: Self-updating repository support (automatic updates for zip installations) - Fixed: VOD playback stability (addressed 400 and 403 errors) - Fixed: "context object" and "AttributeError" in menus - Fixed: Channel listing crashes (Graceful handling of missing EPG data) - Fixed: "ref() got unexpected keyword argument" in catchup menus - Improved: API request encoding and User-Agent for VOD streams - Improved: Default resolution settings for HD channels (1080p)
v1.1.2 - Fixed "context has no attribute: add_item" error in menus - Added: Safety Shield (Auto Backup & Restore for account settings). - Fixed: Addon update failures on Windows (Faster service shutdown).
extension.disclaimer: This plugin is not officially commissioned/supported by Jio. The trademark "Jio" is registered by "Reliance Corporate IT Park Limited (RCITPL)"
